programme.title: Bloomberg TV+
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with guests about global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Life & Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Muleskinner : Earp's old friend Sam McGuffin stops in Dodge City with a load of freight and his six mules.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp Ain't Even Wearing Guns : Earp is goaded by a southern lady into hanging up his guns while her father's Texas crew is in Dodge City. He and Shotgun are forced to resort to their fists to control the outfit.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Bat Jumps the Reservation : Bat Masterson returns to Dodge City after a good streak of gambling with Cora Warrous and her brother.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Truth About Rawhide Geraghty : Earp is asked by Mrs. Geraghty to find out what is bothering her husband. Earp finds out he has one more stagecoach run before he retires but he is afraid to make it.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: She Almost Married Wyatt : A runaway girl is found by Mr. Cousin but when Earp investigates the family who adopted her, he decides she should not be returned to it.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Horse Race : A horse race between horse owner Milt Canyon and Bullhead turns violent when the Indian pony wins.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Juveniles : Earp arrests a boy wearing a gun trying to buy alcohol who looks to be 17 and looking for trouble.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: One Murder - Fifty Suspects : Loan shark Skinner Smith is found poisoned. Everyone in town hates Smith and wanted him dead giving Earp a large number of suspects.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: How to Be a Sheriff : The new sheriff learns the difficulties of the job when he is given papers to evict outlaw brothers.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Judas Goat : A Deputy US Marshal from Topeka asks Earp to help capture a gang of outlaws led by Rocky Griswold.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Doc Fabrique's Greatest Case : Shotgun's mule Roscoe is sick and he wants Dr. McCarty to help. When he says the mule is drunk, Earp decides to call Doc Fabrique from Wichita to help.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Actress : Actress Cora Campbell comes to Dodge City to perform creating interest among the men and especially silversmith Tom Tanner.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Love and Shotgun Gibbs : An agent for the Santa Fe railroad tells Earp that they expect a gang led by One Eyed Brown is going to rob the train.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Dodge Is Civilized : Mayor Kelley wants to close down the remaining saloons just as Bat returns to take over the Lone Star saloon.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Little Gray Home in the West : Earp harbors a desire to own a ranch so when Doc has a chance to win one in a game, Earp goes in on it.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Cyclone : Word is received by telegraph that a cyclone is coming toward Dodge City.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Kelley Was Irish : Mayor Kelley wanting law and order fires Earp and Shotgun after Doc shoots a gunman at de Graff's saloon.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Trail to Tombstone : As Wyatt and his group enter Arizona they are stopped by a representative of Wells Fargo.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Tombstone : Earp decides to ride into Tombstone alone and unarmed to see for himself how bad it is. He finds himself caught in the midst of an ongoing dispute between the miners and Clantons.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt's Decision : Earp decides to leave Tombstone but learns the Clantons are gunning for him. Nellie Cashman and Dick Gird want Earp to stay to bring law and order to Tombstone.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Lineup for Battle : When a man rides into Tombstone with three bullets in him, Earp decides to go alone to arrest Old Man Clanton for stealing the man's horses.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Nugget and the Epitaph : Earp soon learns that the Tombstone newspaper The Nugget is run by a crooked editor who is in league with the gangs running Arizona including the Clantons.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Perfidy of Shotgun Gibbs : Earp requests his old deputy to join him in Tombstone. On the way there, Shotgun is asked by the Clanton gang to vote ten times in the Tombstone election for the judge.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: You Can't Fight City Hall : Earp's crackdown on crime in Tombstone is causing big problems for the Clanton gang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Behan Shows His Hand : Clum and others want Earp to take a posse after the men he was forced to release threaten him, but Earp declines.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Ring of Death : Fed up with Earp's interference, the head of the 10 Percent Ring in Tucson decides to kill Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt Wins One : Earp is summoned to Fort Huachuca where he is told Old Man Clanton has put a claim in for $7000 of beef stolen by the Apaches.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Fugitive : Earp arrests the son of a Mexican for murder before he crosses the border. Earp must get his prisoner back to Tombstone but a posse sent by Behan is after the same man.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Noble Outlaws : Earp's friend Ned Buntline comes to Tombstone hoping Earp will introduce him to the Clantons so he can use them in a new book.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Paymaster : Major Fletcher asks Earp to help transport a $15,000 payroll to the Army fort by way of a stagecoach with an interesting set of passengers.

programme.title: FBI Files
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Dishonored : Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Price of Greed : An armed robbery is a terrifying ordeal. When a gang descended on a Los Angeles cash vault, they threatened to kill anyone who resisted. The violent assault was the largest heist in U.S. history and a piece of plastic was the only evidence.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Shattered Shield : In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Vanished : A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Blood Brothers : When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Bitter End : In Las Vegas, a gang of robbers target an ATM repository and hit the jackpot. Their take was over a million dollars in cash, the largest heist in Las Vegas history.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Dangerous Gamble : They were a gang of criminal masterminds. They carried automatic weapons and were not afraid to use them. With each and every new heist, they became bolder and more deadly, until the FBI stepped in, determined to end their violent rampage.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Shootist : In the late 1980s the FBI matched wits with a cunning bank robber, a lone gunman responsible for the longest string of unsolved bank robberies in FBI history.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Coffee Shop Murders : At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: No Remorse : A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Radical Agenda : In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Unlawful Flight : In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Brothers Betrayed : In the 70s and 80s a gang of thugs wreaked havoc on the island of Puerto Rico. Organized, experienced and deadly they seemed beyond the reach of the law.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Search For Lisa Rene : When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Hunter's Target : Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Final Takedown : The United States is one of the most profitable drug markets in the world. For ruthless and sophisticated drug traffickers, it is truly the land of opportunity.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Dark Woods : While camping with her family in Montana, a seven-year-old girl was abducted from her tent. No one in the campground witnessed the crime and the kidnapper left no clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Trails of Evidence : In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Deadly intentions : When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Remnant of Blame : The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Soldier Stories : This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Patterns Of Guilt : The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Cold Cases : These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Vanished : In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Without A Trace : Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Written In Blood : In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Crimes Of Passion : When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Cold Blooded : Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fateful Twist : A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Dead Men Do Talk : Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tainted Blood : The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Double Helix : DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Crimes Of Passion : When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Spurs : Josh rides into a small town looking for Vic Warsaw but is told by the Sheriff that Warsaw was buried that day and killed by Miss Lucy Fremont the night before.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Reunion for Revenge : Four men break out of prison looking for revenge against Aben Starr who turned them in after their first escape attempt.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Competition : Josh is resting in Benson when two bounty hunters bring in a man - the mayor - dead.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Call Your Shot : A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body, but Josh's search for clues runs up against a cowardly conspiracy of silence.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Secret Ballot : At the request of his friend's wife, Randall comes to assist and protect a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty, quickly running afoul of the established political machine and its corrupt mayor and wanted sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Corner : A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Eager Man : Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Legend : A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Railroaded : When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Double Fee : Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The Kovack Affair : Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Bounty for a Bride : A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Crossroads : Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Angels of Vengeance : A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Littlest Client : Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Annie Oakley
programme.desc: Desperate Men : While Annie and Lofty pursue an outlaw who killed a sheriff, Tagg tries to coach his schoolteacher on the finer points of romance.

programme.title: The Cisco Kid
programme.desc: Cattle Quarantine : Cisco and Pancho stumble across a ranch where the owner is arguing with a number of farm hands. It appears some of the cows have died from disease and the rest will need to be quarantined.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Patsy : A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Bloodlines : After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Blowout : Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Obituary : After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tension : Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's Daughter : Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Panic : Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Ordeal : Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Spiked Rifle : While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Letter of the Law : Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Legacy : Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Baby Sitter : A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Big Race : Cort promises to come up with $10,000 for a nursing home, but he needs Mitch and Craig's help to compete in a water-skiing race with a big cash prize. Shauni’s traumatic fear of the ocean after Jill’s death threatens her future with Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Old Friends : Craig, Mitch, and Garner go for a weekend hang-gliding trip, but Mitch has a serious accident, and ends up facing death before the fangs of a rattlesnake! Cort reacquaints himself with a woman who has a shocking secret.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The End? : A massive earthquake destroys Baywatch headquarters and leaves Gina's life hanging in the balance. Meanwhile, Cort and Craig are trapped in the ocean. And Eddie is the only one left who can help a pregnant woman going into labor.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Nightmare Bay, Part 1 : Mitch rescues an underwater photographer that appears to have been attacked by a Sea Creature in an underwater cave, resulting in a media frenzy. Shauni rescues a young girl in the ocean then has to rescue her family from drowning.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Nightmare Bay, Part 2 : When a fishing trawler mysteriously sinks, the “Creature in the Bay” is thought responsible! Mitch, Devon and Captain Thorpe set out to prove there is more than meets the eye behind this Creature's mysterious attacks.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The One Who Got Away : After Baywatch lifeguard Megan is attacked on the beach, she struggles to regain her confidence – unaware that her attacker, a fisherman, views her as the "One That Got Away." Meanwhile, Shauni suffers from lifeguard burnout.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Money, Honey : After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Fabulous Buchannon Boys : Mitch receives an unexpected visit from his free-spirited brother, whose troubled son entices Hobie to surf the pylons of a treacherous condemned pier. Meanwhile, a local vendor nearly causes a riot when his bikinis disintegrate in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Point of Attack : After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Sandcastles : Baywatch lifeguards gain insight into the plight of the homeless when Hobie befriends a girl who's living on the streets. Eddie is attacked by a former mental patient known as “Hector the Collector.”

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Trophy, Part 1 : Eddie is arrested for statutory rape after a teenage girl lies about seducing him in his tower. Meanwhile, Eric Turner, bitter about the paralyzing accident he suffered as a lifeguard, returns to Baywatch to reconcile his relationship with Megan.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The Trophy, Part 2 : Eddie is suspended from Baywatch over the statutory rape charge. He feels abandoned when no one believes his innocence pleas. Meanwhile, the reckless, paraplegic Turner, wanting to win Megan back, tries to impress her by hang-gliding off a cliff.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: If Looks Could Kill : Mitch falls for the beautiful woman he saved from drowning after she drove her car off a cliff, unaware that she's a cold-blooded murderer and con artist who was attempting to dispose of the murder victim of her latest scam when Mitch rescued her.

programme.desc: Shape Searchers : Joe and Blue are playing Shape Searchers and they need our help. Blue pulls various shapes out of her bag and we look around and find things with the same shape!

programme.title: Blue's Clues
programme.desc: Surprise Guest : It's time to clean up because a special guest is coming over to visit! But who is it? We play Blue's Clues to figure out who our surprise guest is. While searching for clues, we straighten up the house.

programme.title: Blue's Clues
programme.desc: Contraptions : We're making contraptions! Joe demonstrates his amazing "Crayon Slide" for us. Blue is making a contraption, too, and we play Blue's Clues to figure out what it's going to do.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Build Me a Building! : It’s going to be the best doghouse EVER! But before Bubble Puppy can move into his new doggy digs, the Bubble Guppies have to build it. Help them build it while discovering all about construction.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Grumpfish Special : At the Bubble Guppies' restaurant, the group is waiting tables, cooking food,and preparing to serve their most difficult customer yet. But is there anything on the menu that can get the Grumpfish grinning?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: We Totally Rock! : Are you ready to rock? The Bubble Guppies are taking the stage with their guitars, drums and keyboards. Get ready to crank it up to 10 and learn about everything rock and roll.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Call a Clambulance : When Oona’s friend Avi breaks a bone in his tail, he needs to visit the doctor. The Bubble Guppies aren’t too worried – after they learn that it’s a doctor’s job to make everyone feel better.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Legend of Pinkfoot! : The Bubble Guppies are going on a camping trip! Grab your flashlights and gather around the campfire to make s'mores and hear about the spooky legend of Pinkfoot!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Bubble Puppy! : Gil wants to adopt a puppy! But before he can bring the puppy home, the Bubble Guppies must learn how to take care of pets.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Can You Dig It? : Rawrrrrrr! While the Bubble Guppies are digging for dinosaur bones, they learn all about different types of dinosaurs.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Super Shrimptennial Celebration! : To celebrate Shrimptennial, the Bubble Guppies visit Big Bubble City! Join them in discovering the hustle and bustle of the big city and the Big Bubble Building!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Have a Cow! : With an "oink, oink" here and a "moo, moo" there, the Bubble Guppies learn all about farm animals … and discover that a lot of their favorite foods come from a farm too!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Who's Gonna Play the Big Bad Wolf? : The play's the thing when the Bubble Guppies go to see a production of "The Three Little Pigs." But when one of the actors can't perform, it's up to Deema to put on the costume and take the stage.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Spring Chicken is Coming : The Spring Chicken is about to announce the arrival of spring, but first, she needs a beautiful flower. Help the Bubble Guppies figure out how to plant and care for a flower.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Bubble Bites : Glide through the aisles of the supermarket with the Bubble Guppies as they shop for fruits, vegetables and the last box of Bubble Bites for Bubble Puppy!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Check it Out! : Uh oh Gil lost his library card while returning his favorite books to library! Gil and his Guppy friends will have to dive into all of Gils favorite books to find it again.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Good Hair Day! : Whoa! Gils hair grew really long! He had better get it cut soon, because today is Picture Day, and he really wants to look his best.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Puppy and the Ring! Part 1 : In the mythical land of Bubbledom, the evil Night Wizard has taken the magical Ring of the Sun! Someone needs to save the daytime! Will Molly and Gil return the Ring to the Sun King, or will it be nighttime in Bubbledom forever?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Puppy and the Ring! Part 2 : In the mythical land of Bubbledom, the evil Night Wizard has taken the magical Ring of the Sun! Someone needs to save the daytime! Will Molly and Gil return the Ring to the Sun King, or will it be nighttime in Bubbledom forever?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Good Morning, Mr. Grumpfish! : The Bubble Guppies have a substitute teacher: Mr. Grumpfish. He doesn’t seem to like anything! It’ll take a lot for the kids to convince Mr. Grumpfish that their favorite things are worth singing about!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Get Ready for School! : Oona's worried about her little friend Avi! It's his first day of school and he's nervous. From cubbies to free play, the Guppies show us the ropes and teach us that school is a great place to learn, play, and meet new friends.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Police Cop-etition! : Stop, in the name of fun! Officer Miranda teaches Gil and the other kids how police officers use laws to keep us safe. Can the Guppies use what they’ve learned to earn their badges as honorary junior police officers?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Elephant Trunk-A-Dunk! : Gil's looking for elephants! He loves them all—African and Asian. He's in for a treat when the Guppies fill the stands for the Trunk-A-Dunk, a basketball game played by pachyderms!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Super Ballet Bowl! : Jump! Leap! Relevé! Bubbletucky sports fans love ballet! Molly and the rest of the Guppies want to learn how to tell a story through dance. It’ll take practice, but they'll give ballet a new spin in the Super Ballet Bowl!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Wizard of Oz-tralia! : After Molly and Gil meet Bobby, a nature show host from Australia, they can't wait to learn all about Australian animals. From marsupials to the amazing platypus, the Guppies can't get enough of the creatures Down Under!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Arctic Life! : Brrrr! The Arctic sure is cold—probably because it’s filled with so many cool animals! After meeting Arctic Dan, Gil embarks on an icy expedition. With the Guppies’ help, can Gil brave the elements to reach the North Pole?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Puppy Love! : Bubble Puppy’s got a cold! While Dr. Martin, the veterinarian, takes good care of him, the kids spend the day thinking about dogs—a Guppy’s best friend. But will Gil’s get-well card will help Bubble Puppy feel better?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Oyster Bunny! : It’s time for baby animals! Goby dreams up the Oyster Bunny, a mysterious character who loves baby animals. Can the Guppies follow an egg trail to find the elusive Oyster Bunny? A tasty treat awaits them!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Amusement Parking Lot! : Beep beep! The Guppies love cars! But when Mr. Grouper’s car breaks down on the way to an amusement park, will the kids figure out how to get this field trip rolling again?

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Fairy Tales Can Come True : Frasier asks Sam to escort Diane to an event while he is out of town.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam Turns The Other Cheek : Sam reaps the consequences of getting involved with a married woman.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach In Love (Part 1) : Coach proposes marriage when he falls in love at first sight.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach In Love (Part 2) : After Coach's girlfriend Irene wins the lottery, she becomes a socialite and breaks up with him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane Meets Mom : Frasier's mom threatens Diane's life when they meet for the first time.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: An American Family : Carla's ex-husband returns with his new bride, demanding custody of their oldest son. The normally feisty Carla shocks everyone at the bar when she agrees to the request.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane's Allergy : After moving in with Frasier, Diane develops a chronic allergy and believes his beloved dog, Pavlov, causes it.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Peterson Crusoe : Norm decides to live life to the fullest when he gets back his medical test results.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A Ditch In Time : At the bar, Sam's innocent flirtation with an attractive customer, Amanda, gets him into trouble when he doesn't realize she's a member of Diane's therapy group.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Whodunit : Carla wins the favor and admiration of Frasier's esteemed mentor.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Heart Is A Lonely Snipe Hunter : The guys pull a cruel joke on Frasier while they're on a fishing trip.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: King Of The Hill : Sam volunteers to play in a charity softball game against Playboy Playmates.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Teacher's Pet : Sam gets Coach's help to help him pass a geography class and get his high school diploma. But he eventually finds an easier way to pass the course.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Mail Goes To Jail : Norm jeopardizes Cliff's job when he covers his route for a day.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Bar Bet : An old bet forces Sam to choose between getting married or losing Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Behind Every Great Man : An astute reporter visits Cheers and is turned off by Sam's arrogance.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: If I Ever Would Leave You : Nick returns to win back Carla's love when his new wife leaves him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Second Time Around : Sam flips when Frasier wants to marry the first girl he dates after Lilith.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Peterson Principle : Norm gets a tip at work that could guarantee his promotion over the competition.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Dark Imaginings : Sam suffers a hernia while trying to prove that he's not getting too old.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Save The Last Dance For Me : Carla turns to Sam as a partner to go up against Nick and Loretta in a dance competition.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Fear Is My Co-Pilot : Sam and Diane reveal their true feelings for each other while on the verge of death.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane Chambers Day : Frasier plans a pick-me-up party for Diane, but she thinks it was Sam's idea.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Relief Bartender : Woody feels replaceable when an entertaining bartender overshadows him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Strange Bedfellows (Part 1) : Sam expresses interest in politics when he falls for a woman running for city council.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Strange Bedfellows (Part 2) : Diane quits when she finds out Sam's girlfriend wants her fired.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Strange Bedfellows (Part 3) : Diane tries to make Sam's life miserable for pushing her out the door.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Proposal : It is revealed that it was Diane to whom Sam proposed on the telephone in the last episode.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cape Cad : Sam's date, Vicki, checks out of a country inn to visit her grandmother in the hospital.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Money Dearest : Cliff fixes his mother, Esther, up with the wealthy Duncan Fitzgerald.

programme.title: South Park En Français
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Les Gluants : Des humains de l'an 4035 débarquent à South Park à travers un portail temporel et recherchent du travail.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Les Jefferson : Une nouvelle famille arrive à South Park : les Jefferson. Monsieur Jefferson accueille les enfants de South Park chez lui pour les faire jouer dans son parc personnel.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Poire à lavement et sandwich au caca : La SPA manifeste contre l'utilisation d'une vache comme mascotte de l'école élémentaire de South Park. Les écoliers sont obligés d'en choisir une autre.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Supermarché des Ténèbres : La rue principale de South Park se transforme en ville fantôme quand un supermarché géant Wall Mart attire les citadins jusqu'à son tout nouveau magasin aux affaires incroyables.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Maternelle : Cela fait cinq ans que Trent Boyett est en prison. Celui-ci y est incarcéré, à la place des garçons, pour avoir brûlé leur professeur de maternelle. Quand il sort de prison, les enfants paniquent alors à l'idée de sa vengeance.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Course à l'audience : Les garçons de South Park produisent leur propre journal d'informations du matin sur la station de télévision de l'école, et sont immédiatement entraînés dans une intense course à l'audience.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Kit vidéo pour stupide pute trop gâtée : Paris Hilton ouvre une boutique en ville, dans laquelle toutes les petites filles pourront acheter de quoi se transformer en parfaite peste. Son chien s'étant suicidé, Paris veut acheter Butters pour le remplacer.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le don incroyable de Cartman : Après avoir reçu une sévère blessure à la tête, Cartman se voit doté de dons de voyance.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Noël des petits animaux de la forêt : Stan est sollicité par un groupe d'adorables animaux de la forêt pour les aider à construire une crèche pour la naissance de leur Seigneur et sauveur. Il accepte, mais découvre qu'ils servent en fait Satan.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Vagin tout neuf de M. Garrison : Monsieur Garrison subit une opération de changement de sexe, mais il se rend compte qu'il ne pourra jamais connaître les plaisirs d'avoir ses règles ou l'avortement.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crève hippie, crève : La ville de South Park est envahie par les hippies qui veulent faire un festival. Leur ennemi juré, Cartman, compte bien les arrêter.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Wing : Stan, Kyle, Cartman et Kenny décident de devenir imprésarios. Après l'échec de leur travail avec Token, on leur confie Wing, la femme du gérant de City Wok.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Potes pour la vie : Kenny obtient une PSP, mais il meurt. En réalité, Dieu l'a choisi pour mener une lutte salutaire au paradis. Malheureusement, les docteurs réaniment Kenny, qui se retrouve dans un état végétatif.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La fureur de perdre : Les enfants de South Park sont désespérés : leurs parents veulent absolument qu'ils jouent au baseball mais eux s'ennuient terriblement. Tout empire lorsqu'ils apprennent qu'un match de qualification les obligerait à jouer tout l'été.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La Mort d'Eric Cartman : Les enfants se mettent d'accord pour ignorer Cartman, et ce dernier croit qu'il est mort. Butters, qui n'est pas au courant de la supercherie, devient le médium de Cartman.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le jour des érections : Jimmy a des problèmes d'érections impromptues. Étant donné qu'il doit participer au concours de talents, il cherche de l'aide pour résoudre ce problème.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Marjorine : Butters maquille sa mort pour que les garçons puissent récupérer un appareil à faire des prédictions.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Suivez cet œuf : Madame Garrison a encore des sentiments pour Monsieur Esclave, mais en allant le voir elle s'aperçoit qu'il est avec Al Super Gay et qu'ils comptent se marier.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Gros Caca : Randy est constipé. Il prend alors des laxatifs pour aller déféquer. Après quelques instants de terribles douleurs sur le trône, Randy s'apprête à tirer la chasse mais il remarque que son caca est démesurément grand.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Imaginationland Episode 1 : Eric assure avoir aperçu un leprechaun dans la forêt, mais Kyle ne le croit pas. Ils font un pari ensemble : si Cartman prouve l'existence du leprechaun, Kyle devra lui sucer les boules sinon il devra donner 10$ à Kyle.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Imaginationland Episode 2 : Les pires créatures ont été libérées par les terroristes et dévastent Imaginationland, où Butters est toujours piégé. Le gouvernement réquisitionne Stan et Kyle afin de trouver un moyen d'entrer à Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Imaginationland Episode 3 : Suite à l'accident du portail, Stan est entré dans Imaginationland où Butters est considéré par les créatures imaginaires comme un élu capable de sauver Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Guitar Zéro : Stan et Kyle sont accros au jeu Guitar Hero. Mais Stan est meilleur que Kyle, et leur amitié semble s'en dégrader.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La Liste : Les filles ont une liste des garçons les plus beaux de la classe. Clyde est premier, mais à sa grande déception Kyle est dernier.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Amygdales : Cartman se retrouve à devoir lutter pour sa vie lorsqu'une banale opération des amygdales tourne mal.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Nouveau Look de Britney : Alors que les garçons aident Britney Spears à atteindre le pôle Nord, ils découvrent le secret qui se cache derrière sa popularité.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Planète Gros Nibards : Dans cet hommage de South Park au film de 1981 « Métal Hurlant », les garçons découvrent que ce qui défonce réellement, c'est le pipi de chat.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Canada en grève : Lassé d'être ridiculisé, le Canada se met en grève pour avoir plus d'argent et du respect. Cependant, personne ne prend cette grève au sérieux, excepté les enfants.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Ciel, une quéquette ! : Madame Garrison tente de trouver un moyen de redevenir l'homme qu'elle aurait toujours dû être. Cartman doit alors la remplacer et s'occuper de la classe.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Y'a plus d'Internet : Les habitants de South Park se réveillent et découvrent qu'ils n'ont plus Internet.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Un épisode chez les cow-boys : Monsieur Garrison emmène ses élèves en voyage scolaire dans un village de pionniers reconstitué. Alors que Cartman passe la journée avec Butters dans son sillage, des malfaiteurs arrivent dans le parc.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Problème Chinois : Cartman développe une véritable paranoïa envers les chinois à cause du cauchemar qui hante ses nuits depuis peu : la cérémonie d'ouverture des JO de Pékin.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: The Time is Meow : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they will put up with to find love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes refusing to do her hair or makeup and giving her cats spa treatments.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Face Facts : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they will put up with to find love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes having $75,000 of makeup and having 15 living and 30 dead cats in her home.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Puppy Love : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with to find love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes having 36 outfits for her dog and never sleeping more than three hours.

programme.title: Baggage

programme.title: 1 vs 100
programme.desc: Episode 14 : Carrie Ann Inaba hosts this game where one player ("The One") is pitted against "The Mob" of 100 people, with each trying to correctly answer a series of multiple-choice trivia questions for a potential jackpot of $50,000.

programme.title: Best Ever Trivia Show
programme.desc: All Treats, No Tricks : Everyday people enter a fun-filled showdown with Trivia Experts, hoping to join their elite ranks. Can returning champion Miguel best the Experts to get one step closer to earning his spot amongst the legends? Sherri Shepherd hosts.

programme.title: Best Ever Trivia Show
programme.desc: Puppy Love : Watch as three everyday people enter a fun-filled showdown with a panel of Trivia Experts in the hopes of joining their elite ranks. If they know enough about the "land of 10,000 lakes" they just might! Sherri Shepherd hosts.

programme.title: Winsanity
programme.desc: Solid Foundation : In this game show, hosted by Donald Faison a construction worker must place numerical facts in order from lowest to highest to win prizes for herself and members of the audience. Will she make or will she freeze?

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: The King Dance : Players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Minute To Win It
programme.desc: The Visionaries : Teams face up to ten 60-second challenges for a chance to win up to $250,000 in this game show hosted by Apolo Anton Ohno.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: Dating Couple vs. Friends : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as a Writer and a Camp Director compete against a Designer and an Animator to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Washington vs. the Bunny : Rob is torn between going to Washington, D.C. on business and attending Ritchie's school play.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Oh How We Met the Night That We Danced : While clearing out the bedroom closet, Rob finds his old army boots, bringing back memories of how he and Laura first met.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO : Rob invites an old Army pal home to dinner but begins to fear he has a jewel thief on his hands.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Jealousy! : Laura begins to worry when Rob has to work nights with a beautiful television star.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: To Tell or Not to Tell : Complications ensue when Mel tells Rob that he wants Laura to dance on 'The Alan Brady Show.'

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Unwelcome Houseguest : Rob reluctantly agrees to take care of Buddy's dog for the weekend and creates a furor when he brings the animal home.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Meershaltz Pipe : Rob fears he is no longer needed when his co-writers do a show without his help.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Forty-Four Tickets : Rob invites 44 fellow PTA members to his television show but forgets all about it until air time.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Empress Carlotta's Necklace : Rob buys Laura a hideous necklace but Laura can't bring herself to tell Rob how she really feels about it. When Rob invites his parents to see the necklace, his mother has a surprising reaction.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Sally Is a Girl : Rob and Buddy treat Sally as 'one of the guys', even in the presence of Sally's date. When Laura wants Rob to treat Sally like a lady, Mel and Buddy get the wrong idea.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Buddy, Can You Spare a Job? : When Buddy has a chance for a head writer job, Rob and Sally help Buddy get released from his contract. The plan backfires, so Rob and Sally have to find a way to get Buddy re-hired.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Where Did I Come From? : Rob recalls the hilarious events leading up to Ritchie's birth when Ritchie asks the inevitable question.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Curious Thing About Women : Unable to control her curiosity, Laura opens Rob's mail and she instantly regrets it!

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Punch Thy Neighbor : Rob's dentist pal, Jerry, strains the friendship when he starts knocking Rob's television show in public.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Who Owes Who What? : Buddy ignores Rob's efforts to collect an old debt.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Talented Neighborhood : When his show announces a talent contest, Rob finds himself besieged by the parents of neighborhood prodigies.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: A Bird in the Head Hurts : Ritchie claims he keeps being attacked by a giant woodpecker.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Gesundheit, Darling : Rob begins to worry after neighbor Jerry suggests Rob's recent sneezing fits are psychosomatic expressions of repressed rage at Laura.

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Traces of Truth : A high school gym teacher mysteriously left town without saying goodbye to anyone. He later sent letters to explain why. But a closer forensic look at those letters gave investigators an entirely different explanation for where he went and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Key Evidence : When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Breaking News : A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Novel Idea : When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Going for Broke : When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: High 'n Dry : When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dockter Visit : An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Trail of Truth : Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Common Thread : After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Seeing Red : In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Root of All Evil : A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire Proof : A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Traffic Violations : The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Pressed for Crime : Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Photo Finish : Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Murder on the Menu : When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Killer Fog : It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lasting Impression : When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Freedom Fighter : After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dirty Laundry : The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Pinned by the Evidence : After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Insect Clues : Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Breaking News : A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Wood-be Killer : A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Insignificant Others : How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Material Evidence : When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Ties That Bind : Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Second Shot at Love : When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Gold Rush : Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Hear No Evil : In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Army of Evidence : A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Frozen Evidence : One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Trouble Brewing : Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Year We Disappeared : In August 1979, John Busby, a Falmouth, Massachusetts police officer, was ambushed in his car by a gunman in a passing car who shot him in the face. Although wounded, Busby was able to write a note for police at the scene that said “Not an accident.”

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Negotiators : An inside look at 23-year-old Jarrett Jordan, a disturbed man who shot three people and barricaded himself in a house in Queens, NY. He had with him his four-month-old daughter and three hostages.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Thou Shalt Not Kill : A report on the November 1994 murder of Farah Fratta, whose body was discovered in the garage of her Humble, Texas home. She had been shot twice in the head.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Every Picture Tells A Story : On February 15, 2009, Cathy McNaughton was stabbed to death in her home in Sharpsburg, Georgia. The day had started with her husband Alec serving her breakfast in bed.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Blood in the Sand : DNA on one of two teenage girls killed in a similar fashion on a California beach six years apart leads investigators to a suspect who worked inside the police department.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Murder in L.A. : Focuses on two California couples: the Adairs and the Shapiros. Mindy Shapiro discovered that her husband Michael, an orthopedic surgeon, was having an affair with Jeanie Adair, and in 1996, after 11 years of marriage, the couple opted for divorce.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Live to Tell: Afraid of the Dark : A woman spends almost two decades searching for the man who kidnapped her from her bedroom and left her for dead when she was 8 years old.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Web of Seduction : A report on problems which arise when children under the age of 17 receive unwanted sexual letters on the Internet, focusing on Lindsay, a 14-year-old suburban Florida girl who began receiving explicit love letters from a stranger in Greece.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Dangerous Reunion : In 1981, a series of sexual assaults targeting members of the Castleberry High cheerleading team occurred in and around River Oaks, Texas. Detectives quickly focused on Wesley Wayne Miller, former captain of the Castleberry High football team.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Live to Tell: One Last Hug : An updated report on growing dangers of dating and breakup violence, focusing on Melissa Dohme, who agreed to meet a former boyfriend, Robert Burton, for one last hug before they broke up forever. The decision nearly cost her her life.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Murder in Spokane : A report that focuses on the murders in Spokane, Washington over a period of a little more than two years (1997 - 1999) of at least a dozen women, mostly prostitutes.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Tacoma Confidential : A report on corruption and a cover-up by city officials of Tacoma, Washington, focusing on David Brame, the city’s police chief who rose to power despite a shady past.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Power and Passion : 48 Hours probes case of Alabama politician Stephen Nodine -- accused in the 2010 shooting death of his mistress, Angel Downs.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Highway of Tears : Since 1969, more than 20 girls and women have disappeared or been killed along a road in, Canada, known as Highway 16.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Taken: The Amber Dubois Story : A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Why Did Eric Kill? : A report on Eric Smith who in August 1993, at age 13, was convicted of murdering four-year-old Derrick Robie. The child’s body was found strangled and battered with rocks near his home in Savona, N.Y.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Killer Performance : The 2010 murder investigation of 23-year-old dancer Julie Kibuishi in Southern California, and how her friend Sam Herr, became the prime suspect in the case until investigators encountered an aspiring actor with a horrific tale to tell.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: The Real Manhunter

programme.title: Made for Murder

programme.title: Made for Murder
programme.desc: Karen Pedley : When a pensioner dies following a blaze in a Cornish care home, it soon emerges that care worker Karen Pedley has a history of strange connections to arson attacks dating back years.

programme.title: Made for Murder
programme.desc: Malcolm Webster : Malcolm Webster murdered his first wife and attempted to do the same to his second, in a greed-fuelled frenzy; experts discuss whether he was always destined to become a callous murderer.

programme.title: Made for Murder
programme.desc: Stephen Hough : As a teenager, Stephen Hough lied and manipulated his way out of facing justice for a horrific crime; it took forty years for detectives to bring him to justice, when they discovered that his evil deeds had continued long into adulthood.

programme.desc: The story behind Sean Penn's meeting with El Chapo and the famous Hollywood figure who was pulling the strings.

programme.title: The Real Manhunter

programme.desc: False Positive : Patrick claims Shannon cheated on him on their honeymoon and faked a pregnancy. Shannon says she is not ready to let go and wants to stay together. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help this husband and wife reconnect?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Numerous Rivals Struggle Amongst Themselves! The Raging Monsters of the New World : While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Silver Fortress! Luffy and Barto's Great Adventure! : While heading to the next island, Zou, Luffy's appetite causes them trouble and he and Bartolomeo find themselves entangled in the scheme of a pirate lord who can manipulate silver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An Underground Maze! Luffy vs. the Tram Human! : The Tram-Man arrives! And has Luffy, Bartolomeo and Desire on the run! The deeper the three fall into the pit, however, the more clear it becomes that Bill's group hides a terrible secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Sword Technique Heats Up! Law and Zoro Finally Appear! : Luffy, Bartolomeo, and Desire make their way up the mineshaft, but Bill's assassin, Peseta, has other plans! Just when the going gets tough, help arrives, and Zoro battles the assassin head on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Desperate Situation! Luffy Fights a Battle in Extreme Heat! : Luffy, Desire, and Bartolomeo go up against Bill! But the mad, Smelt-Smelt man becomes deranged and lets his true power unfurl! Do Luffy and the others have any hope of exposing Bill's self-serving aims and turning his gang against him?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Curtain-up on a New Adventure! Arriving at the Phantom Island, Zou! : Bartolomeo recounts the formation of the Straw Hats, sharing their moving story with the rest of his crew! Meanwhile, the mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. But when the haze clears, no one is expecting what they see!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The New Warlord! The Legendary Whitebeard's Son Appears! : Luffy and the others arrive at the mysterious land of Zou, and find the Sunny. But when they board, they find the other Straw Hats have already disembarked. Thus, Luffy, Zoro, Robin and the others take on the challenge of climbing the monstrous elephant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Deadly Elephant Climb! A Great Adventure on the Back of the Giant Elephant! : Finally scaling the elephant's back, the Straw Hats continue their search for the other half of their crew! But the mysterious "island" on the back of the elephant may hold more danger than they bargained for, as they learn they are not alone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Battle Begins! Luffy vs. the Mink Tribe! : Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest on the elephant's back, but he's treading in territory where is not welcome! Meanwhile, Usopp and the others make a startling discovery in a ruined city!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Garchu! The Straw Hats Reunite! : Luffy and the others survive the Rain-Ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Start to Counterattack! Great Moves by the Twirly Hat Crew! : Luffy and the others are unexpectedly welcomed at the fortress and treated well by the Minks, although they have to navigate some cultural differences… And Nami starts sharing what happened to them after they left Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Threat Descends! The Beast Pirates, Jack! : Luffy and the others learn about the dangerous intruders who have come to Zou, and why the island is wrecked! Afterwards, Luffy's loose lips get them into trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The King of the Day! Duke Dogstorm Appears! : Duke Dogstorm - the Straw Hats finally meet the ruler of this strange land, and learn more about the battle that took place here; and the mysterious system by which the island is ruled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The King of the Night! Master Cat Viper Emerges! : Day turns to night as the Minks keep up their onslaught against the invading Beast Pirates! But Jack's amazing Devil Fruit power may end the elephant island once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Exterminated Capital! The Twirly Hat Crew Arrive! : Night and day, Jack faces the fury of the two sworn defenders of Zou, but while they put up a good fight, the Minks aren't able to subdue Jack, especially after he brings out his secret weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Time Limit Closes in! The Bond Between the Mink Tribe and the Crew! : In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack on the island of Zou, Chopper and Sanji rush in to save the fallen Mink Tribe - but they will need the help of Caesar to overcome the poisonous effects of the gas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Delinquent Comes Home! Emperor Big Mom's Assassins! : More of the dramatic happenings on Zou are revealed as we learn that Jack's pirate band were not the only visitors to the elephant island! And what about the mysterious fate of Sanji?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Truth Behind the Disappearance! Sanji Gets a Startling Invitation! : The mystery of Sanji's disappearance deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom's lackeys have caught up with him and the rest - and carry with them an invitation from Big Mom that simply can't be refused!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Morgan versus Luffy! Who's the Mysterious Pretty Girl? : Luffy is in the line of fire after saving Zoro, and now tyrannical Captain Morgan is out for their heads! Zoro must decide if he will join forces with Luffy or die in captivity.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's Past! Enter Red-Haired Shanks! : Luffy recalls a time when Captain Red-Haired Shanks taught him a valuable lesson in friendship and set him on his quest to be King of the Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Terrifying Mysterious Power! Captain Buggy, the Clown Pirate! : Luffy crosses paths with the clever thief Nami. A navigator on a quest to collect one hundred million berries, she’s perfect for Luffy’s new crew – except for the fact that Nami hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Desperate Situation! Beast Tamer Mohji vs. Luffy! : Having delivered a deadly blow to Captain Buggy’s pirates, Luffy and his companions need a place to recuperate. But the three are not in hiding very long before the Beast Tamer Mohji seeks them out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Epic Showdown! Swordsman Zoro vs. Acrobat Cabaji! : In the ongoing fight with Captain Buggy’s pirates, Zoro must face off with the Acrobat Cabaji while Luffy continues to do battle with the Pirate Clown himself.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Who is the Victor? Devil Fruit Power Showdown! : Luffy and the gang are on the run after the battle with Captain Buggy! With no place to go and nothing else to do, Nami finally agrees to join Luffy on his quest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Honorable Liar? Captain Usopp! : Luffy, Zoro, and Nami arrive at an island hoping to obtain a ship and crew, but the three are quickly confronted with the blustering Captain Usopp – who has a connection to Luffy’s past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Weirdest Guy Ever! Jango the Hypnotist! : Luffy follows Usopp to the mansion and encounters the brutal pirate Captain Kuro. The scoundrel plans to claim Kaya’s fortune and live the stolen life of luxury.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Expose the Plot! Pirate Butler, Captain Kuro! : Usopp spreads the word of Kuro’s evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Clash with the Black Cat Pirates! The Great Battle on the Slope! : Luffy and crew seek to best Captain Kuro, but they’ve prepared their defense on the wrong side of the island! All looks grim now that Usopp must face off against the Black Cat Pirates alone.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Terrifying Duo! Meowban Brothers vs. Zoro! : In an effort to save Usopp’s village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders’ path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy Back in Action! Miss Kaya's Desperate Resistance! : Nami manages to rescue Zoro’s missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Beat Kuro! Usopp the Man's Tearful Resolve! : Usopp’s friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.
