programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: La Maestra de Musica : "Hola, hola!/ Hello, Hello!/ It's a great day for school/ You know!" Boots' music teacher, la maestra de música, needs to get to school in a hurry - but her bicycle is broken!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Daisy, La Quinceanera : It's Dora's cousin Daisy's 15th birthday party, her quinceañera! But the party can't start without Dora and Boots - they need to teach everybody the mambo!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Save Diego : Dora's cousin Diego protects and defends all the animals in the rainforest. But in order to save a Baby Condor, Diego winds up trapped himself. And now he needs OUR help! ¡No te preocupes, Diego!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Jaguar's Roar : Oh no! Baby Jaguar's best friend, Baby Bear, is stuck on a ledge atop Bear Mountain - and the ledge is cracking! With Baby Jaguar leading the way, Dora, Boots, and Diego race to the rescue!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: A Crown for King BoBo : Dora and Boots set out to help King Juan el Bobo find his crown so we can all go to his Mamí's birthday party. Where did the forgetful king put his crown?

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Got a Puppy : Abuela gives Dora and Boots a present for Dora's new puppy, but they'll have to watch out for Swiper, who's got a bunch of new swiping tricks up his sleeves.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Big Sister Dora : Dora has some really exciting news to tell us: Someone new is joining Dora's family! Someone who sleeps in a cradle, drinks from a bottle, wears diapers and likes to be rocked to sleep. Can you guess who it is? That's right!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Boots to the Rescue : Oh, no! Dora left her music homework in Boots' room. It's a song in English and Spanish, and she needs Boots to bring it to her school so she can sing it to the class.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Super Babies : Dora's baby brother and sister just love bananas, but they also love stories! So Dora tells them a Super Babies story! The Super Babies have to get their bananas back from that Super Villain Swiper the Fox.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: We're a Team : Dora and all her friends are at the Super Adventure Race! To win the race, they have to make it across the Troll's tricky Bridge, past the Volcano filled with gooey balls, over the giant wall, and all the way to the finish line.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Mixed-Up Seasons : It's summertime, and Dora and Boots are having a blast at the beach. But suddenly, they encounter the strangest sight - a snowman in Summer? What's wrong with this picture? Oh, no!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Shy Rainbow : Dora and Boots are hiking on Rainbow Rock when they come across a shy rainbow, Arco Iris, hiding behind a waterfall.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Crab : Dora and Boots are having a blast at the beach when all of a sudden they hear a call for help. It's a baby crab stuck in a net!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Swiper the Explorer : Dora and Boots are playing catch when they discover a lost Baby Fox. And he wants his mommy! Just then, Swiper shows up to swipe Boots' superball.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Jack-in-the-Box : Dora's twin brother and sister have been sick and she wants to buy them a present to cheer them up. Way up on a toy store shelf, she finds a dusty Jack-in-the-Box.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Bark, Bark to Play Park : It's Twins Day and everyone's getting ready for the big Twins Day Party at Play Park! Dora even has a surprise for her puppy Perrito. He has a twin too -- a long-lost puppy brother he hasn't seen since they were babies.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Saves Three Kings Day : "Happy Three Kings Day!" Dora, Boots, and Diego are dressed up as kings for the big Three Kings Day party. They'll be bringing a horse, a camel, and an elephant to carry the presents, and treats for the party, but Swiper scares the animals away!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Pepe's School Day Adventure : Dora's helping her new friend, Pepe the Pig, learn all about his new school. Pepe's really excited, especially when he hears that if the class earns 3 gold stars today, they get a popcorn party!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora and Diego Save Atlantis : Dora and Diego Save Atlantis: Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio leave Enchanted Forest to join Diego in making the lost continent of Atlantis rise by ending an ancient feud between unicorns and dragons!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora and Diego Save Atlantis : Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio leave Enchanted Forest to join Diego in making the lost continent of Atlantis rise by ending an ancient feud between unicorns and dragons!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Knighthood Adventure! : Dora's Knighthood Adventure!: Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights with their friends Rocinante the horse and Dapple the donkey when suddenly they hear a cry for help.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Knighthood Adventure! : Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights when suddenly they hear a cry for help. It's a princess who's calling us from the Royal Garden! It turns out that it's not the princess that needs saving – her kitty's stuck in a tree!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Swiper's Favorite Things : Swiper was packing all of his favorite things for a sleepover at his Grandma's House. But just as he was about to go, a big wind came in and blew everything away! Will Swiper find a way to use his new super-Swiper-spin today?!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: A Ribbon for Pinto : When the train to the Big Horse Show breaks down, Dora, Boots, and Pinto the Pony need your help to get there with the ribbons, so Pinto can win his first blue prize ribbon!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Benny the Castaway : Dora and Boots are getting ready for a big beach picnic with their friends, but when Benny gets stranded on Coconut Island, he'll need rescuing from Dora, Boots, and YOU!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Fantastic Gymnastics Adventure : Dora gets to start the Big Gymnastics Show! But when Swiper swipes her special rainbow ribbon, Dora and Boots need your help on a gymnastics-filled adventure to get it back so they can begin the show! Fantastic gymnastics!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Moonlight Adventure : One night, while taking care of Abuela's 3 kitties, Dora awakens to find that Lucky has chased a ball of string right into a storybook world! Help her find him on a magical moonlight adventure!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Perrito's Big Surprise : Dora has a big surprise for Perrito on Surprise Hill, but Swiper's trying to get there first to swipe it! Join Dora, Boots, and Perrito for an animal-filled adventure with help from lots of friends and their playful pets too!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Thanksgiving Day Parade : Everyone's getting ready for the big Thanksgiving Day parade and dinner, but the Pirate Piggies accidentally float away on Dora's boat float.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Check Up Day : Dora's on her way to the doctors for her yearly check-up! Dora likes going to see Dr. Valdés because she gets to hear her heartbeat, see how much she's grown in one year, and get a new sticker at the end of the visit!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Little Map : Little Map: Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures. And he's getting really good, so today he's ready for his very first treasure adventure!

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: Ninjitsu master Frank Dux journeys to Hong Kong to enter the Kumite, the Olympics of martial arts, and meets a beautiful American reporter. Before long he must face Chong-Li, a vicious Korean master of Tae Kwan Do, in a climactic fight to the finish.

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: End of a Gun
programme.desc: A mall security guard - and former federal agent - crosses paths with a drug kingpin's enforcer after he saves a woman from danger.

programme.title: Jabberwock: Dragon Siege
programme.desc: A mythical beast threatens a small village, leading the locals into an impossible battle for survival

programme.title: Vehicle 19
programme.desc: Recently paroled Michael wants to get his life in order but when he discovers a gun, a cell phone, and an unconscious woman in the trunk of a rental car, he is thrown into the ride of his life. In a race against time, Michael will risk everything.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jack Conrad is awaiting the death penalty in a corrupt prison. He is "purchased" by a wealthy TV producer and taken to an island where he must fight to the death against nine other condemned killers.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: A 24 hour "kill or die" tournament is held in an English town. The winner will claim a $10,000,000 cash prize.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: Mysterious loner Eddie Lomax rides to the last outpost of an abandoned desert highway, prepared to end it all. But when a savage gang steals his prized cycle and leaves him for dead, Eddie's life is saved by a soulmate from his past.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: A 24 hour "kill or die" tournament is held in an English town. The winner will claim a $10,000,000 cash prize.

programme.title: My Boss's Daughter
programme.desc: After a man is asked to house sit for his boss, he becomes determined to get closer to the boss's daughter, but events keep unfolding that stop him from achieving his goal.

programme.title: Made
programme.desc: Jon Favreau and Vince Vaughn team up with rap superstar Sean Combs and the legendary Peter Falk - Columbo - in this wickedly hilarious tale of two hapless guys trying their best to go bad, with criminally comic results.

programme.title: Vampire's Kiss
programme.desc: Teetering on the edge of sanity, volatile literary agent Peter Loew (Nicolas Cage) tries to find purpose in his life through a cutthroat work ethic and a hedonistic nightlife.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Madea Goes to Jail
programme.desc: America's favorite irreverent, pistol-packin' grandmomma is raising hell behind bars and lobbying for her freedom.

programme.title: Vampires Suck
programme.desc: In this spoof of teen-romance vampire movies, a teenage girl is torn between two boys with supernatural powers.

programme.title: Vampires Suck
programme.desc: In this spoof of teen-romance vampire movies, a teenage girl is torn between two boys with supernatural powers.

programme.title: Playing For Keeps
programme.desc: A romantic comedy about a charming, down-on-his-luck former soccer star who returns home to put his life back together. Looking for a way to rebuild his relationship with his son, he gets roped into coaching the boy’s soccer team.

programme.title: Youth in Revolt

programme.desc: Jury Of One : A police informer tells McGarrett that one of the jurors in the murder trial of island strong-arm has been bribed in an effort to produce a hung jury.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Hookman : A double amputee sets out to avenge the loss of his hands by killing every law officer who, he feels, contributed to his maiming.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Tricks Are Not Treats : The assassination of one of Honolulu's most active flesh peddlers threatens an all-out war between two competing vice empires and brings McGarrett and the governor's office into action to avert gang-style warfare.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Why Wait Till Uncle Kevin Dies? : Steve McGarrett investigates a string of five murders of wealthy men and enlists the aid of an undercover agent from the mainland to reveal a pay-before-death inheritance scheme.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Ghost Ship (Aka "Sasquatch") : While hiking through remote wilderness, MacGyver uncovers an elaborate scheme to siphon oil from a pipeline when he comes to the aid of a young girl, terrorized by the legendary Sasquatch.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Fire and Ice : MacGyver teams up with the sister of a murdered friend to expose a diamond heist operation that they suspect is the work of a diplomat, using his status to shield him from suspicion and arrest.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Gx-1 : Working behind the iron curtain to destroy the wreckage of a top-secret jet, MacGyver comes to the aid of a renowned Russian psychic who wishes to defect.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Jack in the Box : MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested and thrown into a labor camp, only to discover they are being used by the local authorities to search for some hidden bank robbery loot.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Widowmaker : MacGyver and Nikki are trapped by old nemesis Murdoc and are forced to flee down the side of a sheer rock formation where an old friend of MacGyver's lost her life.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy, Dear Drew, Drew’s News : “Coming 2 America” star Eddie Murphy. Drew reads your snail mail letters in signature segment, “Dear Drew.” Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new “Drew’s News.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Phoebe Robinson, Design Under $30, National Teacher’s Day : Podcast host Phoebe Robinson joins Drew to help solve some dilemmas in “Drew’s and Don’ts.” Comedian Michelle Collins and Drew play “Change My Mind: Reality TV Edition.” Drew celebrates Nat'l Teacher’s Day with Bronx middle school teacher Jamel Holmes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Best of Digital with Andy Cohen, Gayle King, Sean Evans, "50 First Dates" Reunion Sketch : Drew's best of digital hour! Drew’s sit-downs with "Watch What Happens Live" Host Andy Cohen, "CBS This Morning" Co-Host Gayle King and "Hot Ones" host Sean Evans. Plus, a look at how our "50 First Dates" reunion sketch with Adam Sandler came together.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ben Platt, Samantha Bee, Design Backgrounder: Mid-Century Modern : Actor Ben Platt is joined by his sister-in-law former “Glee” actress Courtney Platt to discuss the new initiative MS IN Harmony helping patients achieve harmony of the body and mind through music therapy. Samantha Bee chats. Design week continues.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Nina Dobrev, Julianne Hough, Drew-Gooder Surprise With David Begnaud : Nina Dobrev and Julianne Hough stop by to chat about their new business venture. Plus, “CBS This Morning” Lead National Correspondent David Begnaud helps Drew surprise a deserving Drew-Gooder.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: David Oyelowo, Lonnie Chavis, Cooking with Joanna Garcia Swisher : David Oyelowo joins Drew to discuss his feature directorial debut and is joined by co-star Lonnie Chavis. Plus, “Sweet Magnolias” actress Joanna Garcia Swisher chats about her online lifestyle page The Happy Place and whips up Pickled Jalapeno Corn.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Neil Patrick Harris, Baking with Duff Goldman, Actress Michaela Watkins, Astrologer Aliza Kelly : Neil Patrick Harris on the inspiration behind Box One, an ever-evolving game that he co-created. Pastry chef Duff Goldman whips up chocolate peppermint cupcakes. "The Unicorn" star Michaela Watkins chats. Plus, celebrity astrologer Aliza Kelly.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ken Jeong, Laura Benanti’s Homeschool Musical, Baking with Eitan Bernath, Erin Brockovich : Ken Jeong joins Drew. Laura Benanti stops by to chat about HBO Max’s "Homeschool Musical: Class of 2020. Cake week continues with TikTok star Eitan Bernath whipping up a giant cinnamon bun cake. Plus, advocate Erin Brockovich co-pilots Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Galentine’s Day Show! Ayesha Curry, Lana Condor, Jill Kargman : It’s our special Galentine’s Day show where Drew spends the entire hour celebrating women! Sweet July Founder Ayesha Curry, actress Jill Kargman and “To All The Boys: Always and Forever, Lara Jean” star Lana Condor all stop by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Emma Roberts, Crafts with Danny Seo, Big Bird, The Weekender : "Holidate" star Emma Roberts stops by. "Sesame Street’s" Big Bird helps Drew celebrate World Kindness Day and Drew wraps up craft week with Danny Seo. Plus, Drew sends viewers into the weekend with a curated list of her favorite picks in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: “The Talk” Hosts, Chef Pilar Valdes, Benito Skinner aka “Benny Drama" : “The Talk” Hosts Sharon Osbourne, Sheryl Underwood, Carrie Ann Inaba, Amanda Kloots, & Elaine Welteroth chat. Pilar Valdes makes a Peppery Steak. Meet America’s youngest hot dog entrepreneur 14 y.o. Mason Wright. TikTok star Benny Drama joins Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jennifer Garner, Pretty Little Middle with Dr. Aliza Pressman : Actress and founder of organic baby food company "Once Upon a Farm" Jennifer Garner stops by to chat. In "Pretty Little Middle," psychologist and parenting educator Dr. Aliza Pressman helps one couple find their own balance in parenting their three kids.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Wayne Brady, 6 Feet Game Show, Leslie Jordan : Game Show week continues with Wayne Brady. Then, Drew hosts 6 Feet Game Show giving a contestant the opportunity to get 6 questions correct from 6 feet away in 60 seconds for $600. Plus, “Call Me Kat” star Leslie Jordan stops by for “Drew’s News.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Anne Hathaway, "The Daily Show’s” Dulce Sloan : Week-long Halloween celebration w/ "The Witches" star Anne Hathaway. "The Daily Show's" Dulce Sloan introduces some single men & their furry sidekicks! Drew goes down to the basement of the CBS Studios with ghosthunter Steve Gonsalves to hunt for ghosts!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Megan Rapinoe, Emma Corrin & Josh O’connor, #ShareTheMic with Luvvie, Design Under $30 : Soccer Star Megan Rapinoe and mom Denise stop by. "The Crown" stars Emma Corrin and Josh O’Connor chat. Luvvie Ajayi Jones joins Drew to shine the spotlight on another amazing black woman. Drew shares her own tips to design like a pro all for under $30.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Vanessa Hudgens, Cookbook Club “Grand Dishes” with Jessica Alba, Drew’s News : Vanessa Hudgens chats. Drew is joined by Iska Lupton & Anastasia Miari, authors of “Grand Dishes,” a cookbook of recipes from grandmas across the globe. Anastasia’s YiaYia and Jessica Alba join to whip up Mediterranean Roasted Veggies. New Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Henry Winkler, Nico Santos, Drew Gooder, Cooking with Chef Aaron Sanchez : Henry Winkler on his latest children’s book, "Lights, Camera, Danger!" programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Family Matters : Walker gets a sinking feeling in his guts when, after arresting two guys for trying to rob a club and shooting the bartender, Alex sets them free and won't give them a reason as to why it all happened.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: She'll Do to Ride the River With : When a woman goes against the State Police's beliefs that her father was a casualty of his own drunk driving, Walker believes her and stumbles across an illegal ring of toxic dumpers.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Unfinished Business : Walker always seems to be just one step behind a vigilante, who gets the jump on the men Walker's supposed to arrest and takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An Innocent Man : A five-year-old case is coming to a close when a serial murderer is finally facing the death penalty. But everyone's dreams come back to haunt them and Walker follows his instincts in believing that they got the wrong man scheduled to die.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: On Deadly Ground : When one of Walker's friends in the DEA goes missing and suspected of being kidnapped by Mexican drug lords, he decides to take an unexpected vacation...and heads south of the border.

programme.desc: Episode 6 : Jeremy is out on the track to recreate the Battle of Britain using a Bentley and a BMW.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Episode 7 : The new BMW M5 is reviewed and the boys try their hand at motor racing on a budget.

programme.title: Chris Harris on Cars
programme.desc: Episode 2 : Chris takes to Italy where he's introduced to the new Ferrari 488 GTB by test driver Raffaele de Simone. Chris is then let loose in the 488 not only on the track, but also on the winding roads of Maranello. Chris also drives the 1950's Ferrari 212.

programme.title: Chris Harris on Cars
programme.desc: Episode 3 : Chris first puts the new McLaren 570S through its paces on track at the Algarve International Circuit in Potimao, and then on the surrounding twisting Portugese roads. Chris also drives the incredibly rare and very yellow Bugatti EB110 SS in the UK.

programme.title: Chris Harris on Cars
programme.desc: Episode 4 : Chris takes the V8 Mercedes-AMG GT S to Laguna Seca in California, to see if it's a genuine rival to Porsche 911. He then reveals that whilst going fast and sideways is his day-job, driving his own classic Citroen 2CV puts a smile on his face.

programme.title: Chris Harris on Cars
programme.desc: Episode 5 : Chris is at Portimao in Portugal, testing the newly turbocharged BMW M3. He then takes its V8-powered rival, the Lexus RC F, around the Monticello Circuit in New York. Which will provide the bigger thrills?

programme.title: Chris Harris on Cars
programme.desc: Episode 6 : Chris goes to Portugal to road test the all-new Mercedes-AMG C63. With it losing its atmospheric, 6.2-litre V8 for a smaller-capacity turbo motor, can it be as much fun as before? Chris then ventures to Tuscany, Italy to drive the Ferrari California T.

programme.title: Chris Harris on Cars
programme.desc: Episode 7 : Chris heads to Portimao Circuit in Portugal to test the 'holy trinity' of hypercars: the McLaren P1, Ferrari LaFerrari and Porsche 918 Spyder. Expect blistering lap times and lots of power sliding.

programme.title: Chris Harris on Cars
programme.desc: Episode 8 : Chris ends his time at the Portimao Circuit in Portugal with the ultimate track-battle - racing the the 'holy trinity' of hypercars: the McLaren P1, Ferrari LaFerrari and Porsche 918 Spyder.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Episode 2 : Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May attempt to find a trio of cars which are equally at home on the race track as they are at transporting a family to the shops, all for a budget of £5,000.

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Fox Hunt : Lucy is jealous after Ricky dances with Angela Randall, an up-and-coming British actress. She gets Ricky away from her by going to the country estate of Sir Clive Richardson, a prominent English film producer, for a fox hunt he is hosting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Goes To Scotland : The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tour : Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Visits Grauman's : The Ricardos are going back to New York in one week and Lucy is determined not to leave Hollywood with the proper souvenirs. She's already got a box full of memorabilia but she still wants more.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy And John Wayne : Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy And The Dummy : Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Sells The Car : When Ricky makes a little money by selling his car, he forgets to tell his New York neighbors who drove out with him to Hollywood that he will buy their return train tickets.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Great Train Robbery : Lucy, unaccustomed to train travel, is sure her trip to New York will be filled with intrigue and romance. When she hears that a jewel thief is on board, she sees herself as the possible heroine of the situation despite Ricky's admonitions to leave.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Homecoming : On their return from Hollywood, Lucy has her hands full with Ricky when he is hailed as a major celebrity. The Ricardos' neighbors join for a grand homecoming celebration and block party in Ricky's honor when the Ricardos and Mertze return together.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Face To Face : Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Goes To The Rodeo : Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Nursery School : Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's European Booking : Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Passports : Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Staten Island Ferry : Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Bon Voyage : The Ricardos and Mertzes are on the deck of the Constitution, ready to set sail for Europe when Lucy rushes down the gangplank for one last goodbye to Little Ricky who will be in her mother's care while she is away.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Second Honeymoon : Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos Visit Cuba : Ricky and Fred are scheduled to judge a beauty contest but Lucy and Ethel plan for them to miss it. The four go out on a little cruise before the contest and Lucy has arranged for the boat's gas tank to be only half-filled.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Paris At Last : Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye."

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Meets Charles Boyer : The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Gets A Paris Gown : Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy In The Swiss Alps : Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Gets Homesick in Italy : Fred Mertz, managing Ricky's European band tour, is very concerned over the expense incurred when he misrouted Ricky's band so he books second-class train passage for the overnight trip to Florence and a fourth-class hotel for their stay.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Italian Movie : The Ricardos and Mertzes are on a train for Rome when Lucy is 'discovered' by an Italian film director who offers her a role in his new picture, "Bitter Grapes".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Bicycle Trip : The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Goes To Monte Carlo : Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Return Home from Europe : The Ricardos and Mertzes need to return to the United States by plane instead of ship creating problems for Lucy who has bought, among other souvenirs, a 30-pound cheese.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Bob Hope : Ricky is opening a new night spot, the Club Babalu, and wants Bob Hope to appear at the grand opening. Lucy fears Hope won't because of her widespread reputation for causing chaos, and wants to reassure him that this time she's butting out.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky Learns To Play The Drums : Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Meets Orson Welles : Orson Welles is scheduled to perform for a benefit in Ricky's club. Ricky is worried that Lucy will foul things up if she is around so he decides to send her off to Florida.

programme.desc: The Thief (Part 2) : While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Thoroughbred : A picturesque thoroughbred horse farm provides an unusual setting for murder when Ben Matlock defends a slow-witted stable hand, Tommy Jenks, accused of killing the stable owner’s daughter.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Model : Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Cult : Matlock believes in the innocence of a man whose brainwashed son insists he saw his father kill the leader of his cult. Ben is the only hope left for a concerned father whose son, David, has been swept into a religious cult.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Priest : A lawyer friend of Matlock’s puts his faith in the crafty attorney when his client is accused of killing a feisty priest, Father Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: A Fistful Of Energon : When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends. However, the Decepticons have other plans in mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: S.U.V.: Society Of Ultimate Villainy : Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard. However, he receives competition from Lockdown when Megatron offers a bounty on Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Autoboot Camp : The second-rate villains of Detroit team up to beat the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Black Friday : While chasing an Autobot traitor, Bumblebee thinks back on the time he spent with Bulkhead in the Autobot Boot Camp.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Sari, No One's Home : Unlikely matchups! It's Optimus Prime and Dinobot Grimlock vs. Blackarachnia and Meltdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: A Bridge Too Close, Part 1 : Sari has to defend the Autobot home base from invading Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: A Bridge Too Close, Part 2 : Megatron comes up with a plan to build a space bridge to Cybertron. However, he needs to capture Bulkhead, an expert space bridge mechanic, in order to build the bridge. Megatron's ultimate goal is to take over Cybertron and eventually the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Transwarped,Part 1 : The Final Battle! It's Optimus Prime and the Autobots against Megatron and the Decepticons in a fate to save both Earth and Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Transwarped, Part 2 : Sari Sumdac is coping with the newly discovered fact that she's a robot. Meanwhile, the Autobots on Earth are trying to figure out a way to warn the Autobots on Cybertron about the spy working for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Transwarped, Part 3 : Things quickly descend from bad to worse for the Autobots when Detroit is menaced by new threats. Meanwhile, Ratchet remembers his first encounter with Omega Supreme and grows frustrated with his uselessness to the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Three's A Crowd : The Autobots are given a triple blow when one of their own is critically damaged, another is overloading destructively and the third has become an assault weapon for Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Where Is Thy Sting? : Bulkhead must face off against the Constructicons and their new leader, Dirt Boss, when they decide to hold the city's oil supply hostage. Meanwhile, the other Autobots manage to capture Lugnut, but find hauling him away a more difficult task.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Five Servos Of Doom : Unaware that he is being followed by the Elite Guard, Wasp heads to Earth to take his revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Predacons Rising : When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Human Error, Part 1 : The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda. However, Blackarachnia has Swoop capture Wasp in her latest attempt to rid herself of her organic half. This experiment goes awry and turns Wasp into Waspinator.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Human Error, Part 2 : On Christmas Eve, Optimus Prime patrols the city in search of Soundwave. With Porter C. Powell selling Soundwave action figures, Optimus is paranoid that the real Soundwave is out there.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Decepticon Air : It turns out that Soundwave has trapped the Autobots in a virtual reality. Now, Sari must free them before Soundwave completely turns them into Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: This Is Why I Hate Machines : In an effort to speed up their return to Cybertron, Sentinel Prime has Jazz pilot the Elite Guard ship through a space storm. The storm's energies reactivate Swindle, who frees his fellow Decepticon prisoners, and the group goes on to take over the ship.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Endgame, Part 1 : A TransWarp accident with the Space Bridge sends Ratchet and Captain Fanzone to Cybertron, where Sentinel Prime has the planet on high alert. They soon end up stumbling upon a plot by Shockwave to steal Omega Supreme's Access Codes from Arcee.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Chase : Trapped in cyberspace with Sideways, Alexis, Rad, Carlos and their minicons become aware of a massive evil entity, far more powerful and dangerous than Megatron, lurking threateningly in the background. Or was it all a dream?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Tactician : A new transformer enters the solar system. On the moon, Thrust the master tactician arrives to assist Megatron in his battle against the Autobots, but all does not go according to plan.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Linkup : With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command - and seriously underestimates the Decepticons. But on the verge of defeat, Optimus reveals a new ability.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Detection : On the moon, Thrust continues his plotting with Megatron. On earth, despite Jetfire saying he's one of the good guys, the kids are suspicious of Sideways - as are the Decepticons. And something huge and ominous is approaching earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Awakening : The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr. Alexis discovers three new minicons, which Sideways says combine to create another ultimate weapon, the Requiem Blaster.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Desperate : The kids try to gather the three Requiem Blaster minicons together. Sky Blast at first resists, then sings the others to him to save Optimus. They all realise there's more to the minicons than first appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Runaway : Understanding that the minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, the kids sneak the new team out of the base. Thrust finds them, but so do the Autobots who save the day. It's agreed the minicons should not be forced to fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Past, Part 1 : Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Past, Part 2 : Desperate to make amends to his old friend, Hot Shot allows Wheeljack to shoot him, but this isn't enough. Wheeljack takes Sideswipe hostage, but Hot Shot rescues him. On the moon, Megatron welcomes Wheeljack to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Sacrifice : Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Regeneration : Hearing Megatron say he is nothing more than disposable cannon fodder, Starscream defects with the Star Sabre. To prove he's genuine, he gives the Autobots details of the moon base. Red Alert works on what's left of Smokescreen.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Rescue : With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Mars : Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Crack : With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Threaten : Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.desc: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret (Part 1) : John Wayne Gacy lead a double life in the 1970s. By day, Gacy was a community leader and part time clown, by night, he transformed into a monster who chose young male teens as his prey.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret (Part 2) : John Wayne Gacy lead a double life in the 1970s. By day, Gacy was a community leader and part time clown, by night, he transformed into a monster who chose young male teens as his prey.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Zodiac Killer: I Am the Zodiac (Part 1) : He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s, killing young couples at secluded lover’s lanes. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues and ciphers. Can DNA unmask this murderer?

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Zodiac Killer: I Am the Zodiac (Part 2) : He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s, killing young couples at secluded lover’s lanes. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues and ciphers. Can DNA unmask this murderer?

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made (Part 1) : In 1990, Florida police were on a search for a killer. Seven men were dead, their bodies scattered along state highways. Misfit Aileen Wuornos frequented truck stops to find her victims.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made (Part 2) : In 1990, Florida police were on a search for a killer. Seven men were dead, their bodies scattered along state highways. Misfit Aileen Wuornos frequented truck stops to find her victims.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The Security Guard Killer : Join Donal as he talks to DCI Peter Hall to discover how he solved the murder of Wendy Upton, without a body, weapon or leads to follow.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The Foot Fetish Murderer : Crime journalist Donal MacIntyre meets former Detective Chief Superintendent Bob Taylor to discover how West Yorkshire Police captured the murderer of Wendy Speakes.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The Family Murders : Renowned crime journalist Donal MacIntyre meets former Metropolitan Police Detect Inspector Tony Bishop to find out how he helped solve the shocking case of the murder of the entire Chohan family.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The Dog Walker Murder : Renowned crime journalist Donal MacIntyre meets Detective Superintendent Marina Ericson to discover how she and her team solved the disturbing case of random knife killer Alexander Palmer.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Triple Murder in Pinyon Pines : The story of 3 innocent victims whose lives were ended violently and abruptly, how the culprits almost got away and how determined detective work and forensic advancements solved the case.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Deadly Disposal : The story of the disappearance and murder of Jeffrey and Jeanette Navin and how tenacious investigators and extensive forensics eventually solved the mystery and brought their killers to justice.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Rev. Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre (Part 1) : More than 900 Americans died in the jungle in Guyana in November 1978. The man responsible, Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide.

programme.desc: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator (Part 2) : The NorCal Rapist terrorized women in Northern California over three decades. This episode details the horror of the attacks, and the new forensic science that led to the suspect’s capture.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: My Sweet Ford : Mike and Frank find a classic 1933 Ford that's been sitting so long that a tree has grown around it, but nothing will stop them from rescuing this rare ride.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Joy of Sax : A garage door in Indiana leads to a wagon from the 1950s that Mike wants to own; on a musical mission from Dani, the guys scour a farm, which has more than chickens and pigs.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Time Warp : Mike and Frank are stunned by a house with storefronts frozen in time, containing a bounty of new-old stock and a secret bootlegging basement.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Bound for Badness : Mike and Frank make a killer backroom deal after winding up at the home of a former arms dealer and her Judo-champion husband.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Presidential Picks : The pickers are on a presidential trail as Mike and Danielle head for Pennsylvania, while Frank and Robbie are on a whistle-stop tour of North Dakota.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Picked a Peck of Pepper : In Texas, Mike and Frank tackle a mega pick at the first Dr. Pepper bottling plant; the guys engage in tough negotiations in a 50,000 square-foot warehouse.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Leland's Cafe : Mike finds two rare bicycles after Danielle gets a sketchy lead about a collection owned by a reluctant seller; Mike and Frank come bearing a gift when they pay another visit to Leland.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Scrappy Go Lucky : In California, a hardcore collector is under pressure from the county to downsize; a hunch leads to a bonanza of vintage cars.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Legend of the Lost Indian : Mike and Frank chase a legend that could be a real buried treasure in Springfield, Massachusetts, the birth place of Indian Motorcycles.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Catch-32 : Mike and Frank have their work cut out for them on a huge property with more custom 1932 Fords than they have ever seen in one place; Danielle takes on an important military mission.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Beetle in a Haystack : A lead on an ultra-rare VW beetle ends up being a true barn find, but it'll take a heavy metal move to bring it home.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: They Boldly Go : Mike and Frank visit William Shatner, who gives them a very specific list of items he wants; the guys visit a man with an amazing poster collection; the hunt for Shatner's items continue until their job is complete.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Civil War Pickings : The Gettysburg Museum asks Mike and Frank to hunt down some hard to find Civil War items on a limited budget.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Rock and a Hard Place : Mike and Frank go behind the scenes of a famous tourist attraction for the pick of a lifetime; in Cape Cod, Mass., a collector shuts down deal after deal until his wife steps in.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget In Mini-Madness : Dr. Claw plots with Dr. Shieskopf to eliminate Gadget with his latest invention, the Linguinis, which are five little men with teeth sharp enough to chew up any material object. Quimby warns Gadget of a suspected MAD plot to make attempts on his life.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Plantform Of The Opera : Inspector Gadget, Penny and Chief Quimby locate and destroy a secret device of M.A.D. that melts metal.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget In Winterland Aka Winter Olympics (The Pilot) : In the pilot episode, Inspector Gadget, Penny and Brain are headed for fun and relaxation in Winterland, site of the Olympic Games. But Dr. Claw and his evil henchmen of M.A.D. have alternate plans.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Smelderado : Dr. Stench, an agent of M.A.D., has invented a substance that makes gold smell terrible. Since smelly gold cannot be kept in bank vaults, it will be valueless in international markets.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: In Seine : Millionaires in Paris are being robbed of their jewels and money. M.A.D. is behind the plot; sending warning notes in advance. Since there is no security system to foil Dr. Claw's devilish plot, it is up to Inspector Gadget to recover the jewels.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Incredible Shrinking Gadget : Dr. Claw hires Dr. Shieskopf to invent a shrinking ray gun to shrink Inspector Gadget down to the size of a mouse. Quimby orders Gadget to investigate a suspected MAD plot at the Eccentric Invention Convention.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Weather In Tibet : M.A.D. has invented a weather machine that controls the weather and is demanding money from cities. Inspector Gadget has to find and destroy the machine or else the cities will be buried in snow.

programme.title: Adele - iTunes Festival: Live in London
programme.desc: Take a front row seat to epic concerts and legendary music documentaries featuring your favorite artists. From classics you'll love to see again to new superstars.

programme.title: Britney Spears - Live from London
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Britney Spears performs her hits including Baby One More Time, Oops! I Did It Again, Toxic and many more.

programme.title: Maroon 5 -- Live in London 2014
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this Maroon 5 concert features songs such as "Moves Like Jagger," "Daylight," "This Love" and many more.

programme.title: Kiss - Live in Nürburgring
programme.desc: KISS impress an audience of more than 85,000 people, in a show of more than two hours and packed with hits, held at the Nürburgring, Germany in 2010.

programme.title: Ziggy Marley - Live at the Filmore
programme.desc: The Fillmore Auditorium is a historic concert hall in San Francisco, California. Founded by Bill Graham, it was named after being located originally on the corners of Fillmore Street and Geary Boulevard.

programme.title: Celine Dion - That's Just The Woman In Me
programme.desc: That's Just the Woman in Me is an American television special by Canadian singer Celine Dion which was aired on CBS on February 15, 2008 and was recorded at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles, California.

programme.title: Avril Lavigne - Live in Calgary
programme.desc: The Canadian Avril Lavigne enchanted the public in 2007 at her show in Calgary (Canada), in which she released the album The Best Damn Thing, which sold, that same year, more than 6 million copies worldwide.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Women Who Rock : In the '60s, artists such as Grace Slick and Janis Joplin, were fronting A-list bands. Garage rock, all girl bands sprang up across the US in the 1960s and were playing rock 'n' roll on their own terms whilst breaking new ground.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Pop Rock : New Wave and post-punk were the successors of the raw nihilism of punk. New Wave was brighter, more pop, synth-heavy and very dance-able.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Jethro Tull : Jethro Tull Named for no apparent reason after an 18th-century British agronomist who invented the machine drill for sowing seed, Jethro Tull has been one of the most commercially successful and eccentric progressive-rock bands.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: The Kinks : The Kinks were a key part of the 1960s British Invasion, and their early hits - especially You Really Got Me and All Day and All of the Night - paved the way for the next decade's hard rock.

programme.title: James Taylor - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas; the festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Foo Fighters - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Green Day: Live at Fox Theater
programme.desc: Green Day peforms from "21st Century Breakdown", at the Fox Theater in the band's hometown, Oakland, California.

programme.title: Rihanna: Live at Made in America
programme.desc: Rihanna performs on the first day of the Made in America Festival in 2016. Rihanna was the headliner of the festival, sampling songs from her album Anti as well as her older hits.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Sue Ellen Gets Her Goose Cooked/Best of The Nest : Sue Ellen is the champion of the popular Internet game, Virtualgoose.com, but she’s become obsessed! And now the gang has moved onto Best of the Nest. Will any of his friends be willing to forgo their computers for a real, live adventure?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success : Arthur's beloved piano teacher is retiring, but she assures him that the new teacher is outstanding--and famous, too! When Buster signs up to sell candy for the band, he figures it's easy money -- who doesn't love chocolate?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Prunella's Special Edition/The Secret Life Of Dogs & Babies : The latest book about everyone's favorite boy wizard--Henry Skreever--is finally out! Every kid in town is lining up to get it, except Prunella, who's ordered a limited edition from England. Ever wonder what Baby Kate and Pal are thinking?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy's Soccer Shocker/Brother, Can You Spare A Clarinet? : Muffy's proud that her dad is the new soccer coach--until he exhausts the team with demanding drills. The try-outs for the Young Person's Orchestra are coming to Lakewood Elementary and everyone agrees that Binky is a shoe-in.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Boy Who Cried Comet/Arthur and Los Vecinos : Buster is convinced that he's seen real UFO's, and he uses Muffy's fancy new telescope to get the proof. Then, Mr. Sipple from next door is moving away and Arthur wonders--who will be the new neighbors?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Citizen Frensky/D.W.'S Backpack Mishap : After visiting The Elwood City Times, Francine decides to start her own paper--The Frensky Star! The tabloid is a success--until all her friends stop speaking to her. Somebody stole D.W.'s backpack!! Who is this fluffy unicorn thief?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Boy With His Head In The Clouds/More! : All the kids know that George is smart--so why does he sometimes have trouble reading and writing? Then, D.W. is thrilled to be getting an allowance. At last, she'll be rich and powerful!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Rhyme For Your Life/For Whom The Bell Tolls : While struggling to write a poem for his mom, Binky falls asleep and gets trapped in Verseberg--where it's a crime not to rhyme! And D.W. has lost her voice! For Arthur it's a dream come true--until Mom asks Arthur to take care of D.W.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Good Sport/Crushed : When the Athlete of the Year Award doesn't go to Francine, she makes no effort to hide her hurt feelings from the recipient. Arthur can't believe his parents are hiring a babysitter--he's 8 years old, and babysitters are b-o-r-i-n-g!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Loses His Marbles/Friday The 13th : When Arthur discovers that Grandma Thora is a marbles champion, he trains with her so he can beat all his friends. Then, Brain doesn't believe in superstitions, so when he has a string of bad luck, he's stunned.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Cast Away/The Great Sock Mystery : Arthur is thrilled when Dad invites him to go fly-fishing for the weekend. But a change in plans forces them to include D.W. Find out once and for all where socks disappear to when Baby Kate and Pal team up to solve the great sock mystery.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine's Split Decision/Muffy Goes Metropolitan : Lakewood Elementary is sure to win the big bowling tournament on Saturday, but Francine's cousin is having his Bar Mitzvah at the same time! Muffy happily accepts an invitation to spend the weekend in the bustling Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Ants in Arthur's Pants/Don't Ask Muffy : To excel in science, the class has to prove that they have P.A.N.T.S.--the ability to be patient, attentive, nosy, thoughtful, and systematic. And Muffy starts an advice column to launch her career as a rich and famous talk-show host.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: To Tibble the Truth/Waiting to Go : When the Tibble Twins' constant lying lands them in constant trouble, they promise to tell only the truth. Binky and Brain collide on the soccer field, breaking Brain's new watch and nearly breaking their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Elwood City Turns 100! : Arthur and his friends commemorate their 100th episode in style! Mr. Ratburn's class is chosen to stage a musical tribute to Elwood City for its centennial celebration, which quickly becomes a drama behind the curtain!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Pick a Car, Any Car/Jenna's Bedtime Blues : The family car is broken, and so is Arthur's heart. How can Mom and Dad even think of replacing it? It’s Muffy's annual slumber party, and Jenna is finally invited! But what if the other girls discover that she's an occasional bed-wetter?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry : Prunella's loves doing yoga with her mom, but when her best friend joins them, will she be able to share her time? When Arthur decides to take on The Brain at a checkers competition, everyone rallies behind the underdog.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The "A" Team/Emily Swallows a Horse : Francine and Brain are the best players on the soccer team, and they wish their teammates could take the game a bit more seriously. And then Emily really wants the sparkly ball D.W. just found, so she tells a little white lie about it.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker : After the Tibbles get a set of drums to play at the music festival, D.W. is determined to get an even bigger and louder one. Then, Buster is always telling the most incredible stories, but now he claims there is a tiger in the state forest.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky Goes Nuts/Breezy Listening Blues : When Binky discovers that he's allergic to peanuts, he has so many questions, but learns that the best way not to go nuts is to be well informed and to understand his allergy. Much to his horror, Brain gets a "B-" on a test.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Happy Anniversary : Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Squirrels/Fern and Persimmony Glitchet : After watching the classic horror movie, "The Squirrels," Arthur and his friends are scared to step out into the playground, and everywhere else! Fern's story about perfect Felicity Bonchance is thought perfectly boring by her friends.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets : When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Feeling Flush/Family Fortune : During a drought, Francine bets Arthur that her family can use less water than his. The TV show, Treasure Caravan, is coming to Elwood City! Arthur and D.W. are convinced they'll find treasures that will make them rich and famous.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order : D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears : The Elwood City Grebes haven't won the Baseball Championship since 1918. But with the addition of three players, the title is finally within reach. Arthur finally saves enough money to buy the bike of his dreams!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Unfinished/D.W., Bossy Boots : Arthur is completely riveted by a book and can't wait to see how it ends. But the last few pages are missing! Now what? For D.W., there's nothing better than getting her own way--that is, until all her friends stop playing with her.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW! : Binky may be tough and strong, but when it comes to sports, he always seems to choke. D.W. is having trouble hearing and needs an ear operation. Is it okay to be just a little bit scared?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Do You Speak George?/World Girls : Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men
programme.desc: Mayhem ensues when a hunter stumbles upon dead bodies, a stash of heroin and more than $2 million in cash.

programme.title: The Sapphires
programme.desc: A would-be music promoter (Chris O'Dowd) sees something special in a girl group of four Australian singers and takes them to Vietnam to perform for American troops.

programme.title: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: A mentally unstable IRS auditor (Will Ferrell) hears an author's (Emma Thompson) voice in his head and discovers that he is the ill-fated protagonist of her latest work.

programme.title: Get a Job
programme.desc: A young man (Miles Teller) and his girlfriend (Anna Kendrick) struggle to find desirable employment after graduating from college.

programme.title: Rapture-Palooza
programme.desc: Left behind after the Rapture, a young woman (Anna Kendrick) and her boyfriend (John Francis Daley) set out to prevent the Antichrist (Craig Robinson) from taking her as his unholy bride.

programme.title: Safety Not Guaranteed
programme.desc: A disaffected magazine intern (Aubrey Plaza) befriends an unusual guy (Mark Duplass), who is looking for a partner to accompany him on a trip back through time.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Van Wilder
programme.desc: An underachieving collegian (Ryan Reynolds) needs money to stay in school after his father (Tim Matheson) cuts off his funds.

programme.title: Soul Men
programme.desc: Old animosities re-emerge when two estranged singers (Samuel L. Jackson, Bernie Mac) travel cross-country to perform in a tribute concert for their late band leader.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Sight Unseen : Saudi Airways and Kazakhstan Airlines jets hit each other at 14,000 feet sending both planes spiraling to the ground.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Falling Fast : Investigators discover a shocking mistake when pilots must ditch their plane in the Mediterranean, killing 14 of the 34 passengers.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Heading for Disaster : A look at the frightening crash of Ethiopian Airlines Flight 409 in 2010; after ruling out terrorists, investigators came to a highly controversial conclusion.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Pilot Betrayed : Two minutes after Scandinavian Airlines Flight 751 leaves Stockholm in 1991, smoke filters through the cabin and both engines fail, one erupting into flames.

programme.title: Mayday: Accident Files
programme.desc: Collision Course : Three last-resort maneuvers where open water is the only available runway.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Death of the President : When Polish President Lech Kaczyński is killed in a plane crash, investigators discover that this was not simply a pilot error.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Carnage In Sao Paulo : Ninety-five people die when TAM Airlines flight 402 crashes seconds after take-off; experts investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster the Accident Files
programme.desc: Deadly Data : With hidden flaws buried in their navigation systems, three planes suffer catastrophic computer errors that force investigators to dig deep for clues.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster the Accident Files
programme.desc: Ticking Time Bomb : From corrosion and metal fatigue to faulty repairs, three doomed airlines are brought down by gradually deteriorating parts.

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: Bad Pilot Pairings : With personality clashes in the cockpit, three flights end in tragedy.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: North Sea Nightmare : A turboprop narrowly averts disaster after a lightning strike over the North Sea; investigators uncover an unusual feature in the plane that plays a key role in this calamity.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster the Accident Files
programme.desc: Time Critical : In a rush to complete their flights, three different flight crews skip key procedures, ignore signs of danger and make deadly decisions.

programme.title: The Accident Files
programme.desc: Runway Collisions : A look at runway incursions.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Operation Babylift : During the Vietnam War when over 250 children, who were being airlifted to safety on a US Air Force C5A Galaxy, died in an explosion.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: John & Kelsey : John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Devan & Rylan : For shy Devan, meeting Rylan was love at first click. Devan wants to believe that Rylan is marriage material but her suspicious behaviour is leaving him with doubts. (S4, ep18)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Steven & Samm : Steven is due to graduate high school, instead of planning for college he wants to move to California for his online love, Samm. Steven's mom is sceptical of Samm's identity.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jamey and Ari : Jamey fell for Ari online, and he will do anything to meet her, but she will only do it on TV! Nev and Max help Ari share her story, and she hopes Jamey will accept her as she is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Antwane & Tony : Nev and Max are contacted by Carmen who is sounding the alarm on behalf of her cousin, Antwane. He's been in a 3-year romance with a man named Tony that he met on a telephone chat line.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tiana & James : After a three-year online relationship, Tiana moved across the country to be with the love of her life, James, and reveal her secret. But now James seems more elusive than ever. (S4, ep11)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Rod & Ebony : Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jarrod & Abby : How do young people who've embraced the digital age find love? Often by connecting online with others they've never met in person before. The problem -- that cute guy you may be falling in love with could be lying about who he really is.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Solana & Elijah : Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Felipe & Jasmine : Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Bianca & Brogan : When Brogan disappears from the Internet, then returns online after a year without question, Bianca wants to know what happened in the missing year.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jen & Skylar : After being bullied in her past, Jen relies on online communities to establish relationships. After meeting Skylar online, they immediately hit it off. But they've never met in person!

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Mike & Felicia : Mike and Felicia met online and soon hit it off. After agreeing to meet, Felicia stood Mike up, offering only thin excuses. Can Mike trust Felicia - or will he end up disappointed?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Keyonnah & Bow Wow : Superfan Keyonnah can hardly believe her luck, she's almost certain that she's been having an online relationship with her childhood crush, the rapper Bow Wow. Is this too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Harold & Armani : Harold found his match with a beautiful fellow jock named Armani. Although they live in the same area, they've never met. Nev is joined by Angel Haze to help Harold get his perfect girl.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Brittany & Bryon : Brittany finds love online with Bryon, a marine who may get deployed again to Iraq, she seeks Nev and Max's help before she runs out of time to discover if the perfect military man is real. (S4, ep20)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Chitara & Priscilla : Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened.

programme.desc: Trina & Scorpio : Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved?

programme.desc: Depth Takes a Holiday : Daria is approached by two imaginary friends to get Christmas, Halloween, and Guy Fawkes Day to return to Holiday Island, and Helen and Jake get struck by Cupid's arrow.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria Dance Party : Brittany and Kevin get into a heated fight, Sandi baits Quinn into organizing the school dance, and Jodie gives Brittany relationship advice.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The Lost Girls : The editor of a teen magazine comes to Lawndale High to hang out with Daria, Jake struggles with the latest teen lingo, and Jane's clever idea begins to take root.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: It Happened One Nut : Jake gets Daria a job after she reveals the result of her career aptitude test, Trent and Jesse attempt to write a new song, and Jane tries to save Daria from humiliation.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria! : As a hurricane approaches Lawndale, the town's residents spontaneously break into song, and Daria, Jane, Brittany, and Kevin are forced to brace the storm together.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Lane Miserables : When Jane's family members all come home at once, she and Trent temporarily move into Daria's house, Helen and Jake pick Jane's brain, and Daria imagines a future with Trent.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Jake Of Hearts : Two wacky radio DJs broadcast their show outside of Lawndale High, and Daria's grandma Ruth moves into the Morgendorffer household after Jake suffers a medical emergency.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Speedtrapped : Jake and Helen take off on a marriage seminar, and Daria and Quinn take a road trip to bail out Jane and Mystik Spiral.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The Lawndale File : Daria and Jane wonder if aliens have taken over their town after Secret Service agents urge the students at Lawndale High to report anyone who exhibits strange behaviors.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Just Add Water : Lawndale High's students and faculty members must swim for their lives after attending a mandatory casino night on the Princess Fairy luxury liner.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Jane's Addition : Trent agrees to help Jane and Daria on their multimedia project, and Daria feels threatened when Jane falls for a guy named Tom.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Partner's Complaint : Daria and Jane team up with different partners on an economics project after new tensions over Tom put a rift between them.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Anti-Social Climbers : Daria's class is caught in a snowstorm while on a field trip to the mountains, and Jake and Helen try to reignite intimacy in their relationship.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: A Tree Grows In Lawndale : Lawndale's reputation takes a major hit when an injured Kevin leaves the football team after a motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Murder, She Snored : Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The F Word : While trying to be a conformist for an assignment, Jane is selected by the cheerleaders to replace Brittany on the squad.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: I Loathe A Parade : During Lawndale's homecoming parade, Daria and Tom find themselves reluctantly wrangling a precocious child together.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Of Human Bonding : Daria joins Jake on a business trip where he tries to court a big-name client, and Helen tries to bond with Quinn at a sleepover.
